embedding.description: A request to generate the embeddings.

model.description: The model used to generate the embeddings.

properties.description: The list of properties to use to generate the embeddings.

items.description: The list of properties to use to generate the embeddings.

embedding.title: EmbeddingRequest

id_generator.description: The entity id generator, by default uses the web page path.

output_types.description: The type of the generated entities, by default `http://schema.org/WebPage`.

items.description: The type of the generated entities, by default `http://schema.org/WebPage`.

sitemap_url.description: URL of a sitemap to crawl and import. Only http/https scheme and publicly routable addresses are accepted.

sitemap_url_regex.description: A regex filter to apply to discovered URLs, it only applies to URLs in sitemaps.

urls.description: Explicit list of page URLs to import. Only http/https scheme and publicly routable addresses are accepted.

items.description: Explicit list of page URLs to import. Only http/https scheme and publicly routable addresses are accepted.
